pages.text: Fortron is a form of energy that MFFS machines use as a source of power. It is produced and stored initially by the $(l:machines/coercion_deriver)Coercion Deriver$() to then be transferred to other machines by the $(l:machines/fortron_capacitor)Fortron Capacitor$().

Fortron is very energy dense, so you will need an ample supply of energy to generate a usable amount of Fortron per second. You can can view the FE/RF to Fortron conversion rate in the $(l:machines/coercion_deriver)Coercion Deriver$() energy tooltips.
